# DearNote

> DearNote is a web tool that enables users to create animated digital greeting cards and memory journals without requiring an account.

DearNote operates on a one‑time payment model; after publishing, each card is accessible via a unique link and a heart‑shaped QR code for 90 days.

## Home
- [DearNote Home](https://dearnote.asia): landing page introducing the greeting‑card creation service.
